title: Tokyo Charcoal Moulding
shortDescription: High-density charcoal louvers and architectural wall panels designed for striking commercial and residential interiors in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
The Tokyo Charcoal Moulding series redefines premium interior spaces across Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. Engineered with ultra-high-density Wood Plastic Composite (WPC), these louvers offer the perfect blend of aesthetic elegance, acoustic dampening, and structural durability. Unlike traditional wood, our charcoal panels are designed to withstand extreme North Indian weather conditions without warping or fading.

Whether you are designing a high-profile corporate boardroom in Cyber City, a luxury hotel reception in Aerocity, or a premium residential accent wall, the Tokyo series provides a flawless, seamless finish. The deep, rich 3D textures mimic high-end architectural wood while offering the zero-maintenance benefits of advanced polymers.

As a leading supplier in Haryana and NCR, Goals Floors ensures that every panel meets strict B2B commercial standards, including Class B1 fire retardancy and 100% termite resistance, making it the top specification choice for leading interior designers and modern architects.

features.title: Waterproof Mouldings
features.description: Made from premium virgin polymers. Totally waterproof, mold-resistant, and damp-proof—perfect for any moisture-prone indoor wall.

features.title: Cut-to-Fit Design
features.description: Easily trim the mouldings to your desired size on-site. Precision-engineered for a perfect fit in any corner or specialized layout.

features.title: Seamless Installation
features.description: Achieve a smooth, nail-free finish. These mouldings bond securely using simple adhesive, leaving no visible joints or marks.

features.title: Ready to Paint
features.description: All panels come pre-primed. Just apply a final coat of your favorite paint to perfectly match your room's color scheme.

features.title: Quick & Simple
features.description: No heavy tools or professional help needed. Simply apply strong adhesive and press into place for instant architectural results.

features.title: Endless Design Freedom
features.description: Mix and match different profiles to create any pattern—from modern minimalism to classic French-style wall paneling.

applications: Premium Retail Store Facades & Display Walls

logistics.Express Delivery: Same-day dispatch available for Delhi NCR

installation: Features a proprietary seamless interlocking mechanism for invisible joint finishing. Installed rapidly using standard structural PU adhesives (like 3M or equivalent) and concealed brad nails directly onto levelled plastered walls, plywood, or aluminum framing. No heavy machinery or wet-work required, ensuring a clean site.
maintenance: 100% washable and highly resistant to stains. Simply wipe with a damp microfiber cloth. For stubborn marks, use a mild soapy solution. Strictly do not use acid-based cleaners, bleach, or abrasive wire scrubbers to maintain the foiled texture.

faqs.question: Do you supply wholesale WPC charcoal louvers to construction sites in Gurugram and Delhi?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a premier B2B supplier of WPC louvers in Delhi NCR. We cater to bulk orders for architects, interior contractors, and builders with tiered wholesale pricing and dedicated site delivery from our Gurugram warehouse.

faqs.question: Can this charcoal moulding be installed on damp walls or basement areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, WPC is 100% waterproof and moisture-resistant, making it ideal for basements or walls with mild condensation. However, we highly recommend treating severe dampness or active fungus before installation to ensure the PU adhesive bonds perfectly to the substrate.

faqs.question: How does this material perform in Delhi NCR's extreme summer heat?
faqs.answer: The Tokyo series is engineered with a high-density core that offers excellent thermal stability. It will not expand, warp, or crack under standard indoor temperature fluctuations, making it perfectly suited for the North Indian climate.

faqs.question: Do these wall panels require painting, polishing, or sealing after installation?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Our charcoal louvers come pre-finished with a premium hot-stamped foil layer and 3D texture. They require zero painting, polishing, or toxic sealants, saving you massive time and labor costs on site.

faqs.question: Are these louvers fire safe for commercial buildings, offices, and hotels?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are manufactured with Class B1 fire-retardant properties. They do not actively support combustion and are self-extinguishing, making them safe and compliant for commercial interior applications and high-rises.

faqs.question: Do they offer any soundproofing or acoustic benefits for home theaters?
faqs.answer: While not a dedicated acoustic foam, the fluted/louvered 3D geometry effectively breaks sound waves, significantly reducing echo and reverberation in large rooms like home theaters, auditoriums, and corporate boardrooms.

faqs.question: How do you calculate the exact requirement and wastage for my wall?
faqs.answer: Simply measure the width and height of your wall. One panel covers roughly 4.7 inches of width. For standard installations, we recommend factoring in a 5% to 8% wastage margin. Our sales team provides exact box calculations during your consultation.

faqs.question: Can I visit your showroom in Gurgaon to see the charcoal moulding samples?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Architects and clients are welcome to visit our experience center in Gurugram to physically check the textures, finishes, and interlocking quality of our entire wall panel and flooring range.

title: Premium WPC Exterior Louvers
shortDescription: 100% weatherproof WPC exterior louvers designed for striking building facades, balconies, and outdoor wall cladding in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Elevate your building's front elevation with our ultra-durable WPC Exterior Louvers. Specifically engineered to withstand the extreme summer heat and heavy monsoons of the North Indian climate, these exterior cladding panels offer a premium wooden finish without the high maintenance of natural wood.

Whether you are an architect designing a modern facade in Gurgaon, or a builder executing a luxury villa project in South Delhi, our WPC louvers provide unparalleled UV resistance and structural integrity. They will not warp, fade, rot, or attract termites, ensuring your exterior designs remain pristine for decades.

As the leading outdoor WPC louver supplier in India, Goals Floors offers a genuine 5-year replacement warranty and a 20-year lifetime assurance. From commercial buildings to residential privacy screens, our exterior range is the ultimate choice for weather-resistant architectural beauty.

features.title: 100% Weatherproof & Waterproof
features.description: Engineered for the outdoors. Zero water absorption prevents swelling, rotting, and fungal decay even during heavy monsoons.

features.title: Advanced UV Protection
features.description: Co-extruded with a protective UV-resistant shield that prevents fading and discoloration under direct, harsh sunlight.

features.title: Zero Exterior Maintenance
features.description: Say goodbye to yearly polishing or painting. These louvers retain their premium wood look with just an occasional water wash.

features.title: Termite & Borer Proof
features.description: The polymer composite core is completely immune to pest attacks, providing a lifetime of structural safety.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Architecture
features.description: Made from 100% recyclable materials, combining reclaimed wood fibers and high-density polymers for sustainable building.

features.title: High Structural Strength
features.description: Impact-resistant and highly rigid, designed to withstand heavy wind loads on high-rise building facades.

logistics.Box Coverage: Approx. 27 to 34 Sq. Ft. per Box
logistics.Availability: Ready Stock in Delhi NCR Warehouse

installation: Requires a sturdy sub-frame of Aluminium or MS (Mild Steel) pipes. The louvers are seamlessly installed over the framework using specialized concealed stainless-steel clips and exterior-grade fasteners, ensuring hidden joints and maximum wind-load capacity.
maintenance: Virtually maintenance-free. Use a standard water hose to wash away exterior dust. For bird droppings or stubborn dirt, use a soft brush with mild soapy water. Never use harsh industrial chemicals or pressure washers at extremely close range.

faqs.question: Are these WPC louvers suitable for direct sunlight exposure in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our WPC exterior louvers are manufactured with a specialized co-extruded UV shield. This technology prevents the color from fading or the material from cracking under the intense summer heat of Gurgaon and Delhi.

faqs.question: Can I use exterior louvers for my balcony ceiling?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are highly recommended for balcony ceilings and privacy screens. Being lightweight yet structurally strong, they add a luxurious wooden touch to outdoor ceilings without the risk of moisture damage.

faqs.question: How do WPC exterior louvers compare to real wood or HPL?
faqs.answer: Unlike real wood, WPC requires zero yearly polishing and is 100% termite-proof. Compared to HPL (High-Pressure Laminates), WPC louvers offer a rich 3D architectural depth and flute profile that flat HPL sheets cannot match.

faqs.question: Do you provide wholesale pricing for builders and architects?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a premier B2B supplier. We offer tiered wholesale pricing, professional discounts, and dedicated account managers for architects, exterior contractors, and bulk project buyers.

faqs.question: What is the warranty on your exterior cladding panels?
faqs.answer: We offer a genuine 5-year replacement warranty against manufacturing defects, warping, and severe color fading, along with a 20-year lifetime assurance on the material's structural integrity.

faqs.question: How is the installation done on front elevations?
faqs.answer: Installation is done using a dry-cladding method. A grid of Aluminium or MS hollow pipes is fixed to the wall, and the louvers are interlocked onto this frame using concealed clips. We provide technical installation guidance for your contractors.

faqs.question: Will rainwater cause rotting or fungal growth?
faqs.answer: No. The high polymer content makes our exterior louvers 100% waterproof and non-porous. Rainwater easily washes off the surface without being absorbed, completely preventing rot, decay, and fungus.

faqs.question: Can these louvers be bent for curved facades?
faqs.answer: Standard WPC exterior louvers are rigid and designed for flat surfaces. For curved facades, the sub-framing must be faceted, or specialized flexible materials should be considered. Contact our technical team for specific curved designs.

faqs.question: What are the available lengths, and can they be customized?
faqs.answer: The standard length is 2900mm (approx 9.5 feet) which minimizes wastage for most floor-to-ceiling heights. For very large commercial projects, custom lengths can be manufactured against a minimum order quantity (MOQ).

faqs.question: How soon can you deliver to a project site in Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: We maintain extensive ready stock in our local warehouses. For standard shades and sizes, we can arrange express delivery to project sites in Gurgaon, Noida, and Delhi within 24 to 48 hours.

title: Cobra WPC Fluted Panel Series
shortDescription: India's highest-selling premium Cobra WPC fluted panels, perfect for luxurious TV backgrounds and interior walls.
longDescription:
Transform your interiors with the timeless elegance of the Cobra WPC Fluted Panel series by Goals Floors. Recognized as India's most preferred fluted wall panel, the Cobra series offers unmatched durability and a stunning natural wood-like finish that instantly elevates any residential or commercial space.

Unlike cheaper PVC or low-grade MDF panels that easily scratch, fade, or absorb moisture, our Cobra WPC panels are engineered with a high-density wood-polymer composite core. This makes them highly resistant to termites, moisture, and daily wear-and-tear. Whether you are creating a striking TV background wall in a living room, a sophisticated bedroom headboard, or a welcoming corporate lobby, the Cobra series delivers a flawless, high-end aesthetic.

Available in multiple profiles including the popular 12mm Curve, 12mm Wave, and heavy-duty 24mm options, the design possibilities are endless. Trust the brand chosen by top interior designers across Delhi NCR for premium, hassle-free interior execution.

features.title: Premium Wood-Like Elegance
features.description: Achieve the luxurious look and feel of natural timber without the astronomical costs and heavy maintenance of real wood.

features.title: Termite & Borer Resistant
features.description: The WPC core provides exceptional resistance against termites and insects, ensuring the longevity of your interior investments.

features.title: Moisture & Dampness Proof
features.description: Highly effective against indoor moisture. It will not swell, warp, or peel, making it safe for air-conditioned rooms and humid areas.

features.title: Superior to PVC & MDF
features.description: Offers significantly higher impact resistance and structural rigidity compared to brittle PVC or moisture-prone MDF panels.

features.title: Rapid Interlocking System
features.description: Designed with a smart tongue-and-groove profile that allows for lightning-fast, seamless installation hiding all nails and joints.

features.title: Acoustic Softening
features.description: The ribbed/fluted profile of the Cobra series helps diffuse sound waves, subtly improving the acoustic comfort of the room.

logistics.Availability: High Volume Ready Stock in NCR

installation: Extremely fast and clean installation. Panels are cut to size and pasted directly onto levelled plastered walls or a plywood base using heavy-duty PU adhesives (like 3M or equivalent) and secured with hidden brad nails through the interlocking lip.
maintenance: Dust regularly with a dry cloth or vacuum with a brush attachment. For marks, wipe gently with a slightly damp microfiber cloth. The premium finish requires no varnishing or active maintenance.

faqs.question: Why should I choose Cobra WPC panels over cheaper PVC panels?
faqs.answer: Cobra WPC panels offer superior structural density. Cheap PVC is hollow, brittle, and easily cracks upon impact. Cobra WPC looks like authentic wood, handles impacts better, and lasts significantly longer without looking 'plasticky'.

faqs.question: Can the Cobra Fluted Panels be used for TV background walls?
faqs.answer: Yes, this is one of their most popular applications. The fluted design creates a stunning, luxurious backdrop for modern TVs and hides unsightly wiring perfectly behind the panel framework.

faqs.question: Are these panels safe for bedrooms and living rooms?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The Cobra series is manufactured using eco-friendly materials and is free from harmful VOC emissions, making it completely safe and hygienic for indoor residential use.

faqs.question: Do I need to paint or polish these panels after installation?
faqs.answer: No. The Cobra WPC Fluted Panels are pre-finished with high-quality, scratch-resistant wooden textures. They are ready-to-use right out of the box, saving you time and messy paint jobs on site.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the 12mm Curve and 12mm Wave profiles?
faqs.answer: The 'Curve' profile features deep, semi-circular flutes for a bold, traditional louvered look, while the 'Wave' profile has softer, shallower undulations for a more subtle and modern aesthetic. Both are highly popular.

faqs.question: Can these panels be installed directly on a damp wall?
faqs.answer: While the WPC material itself is 100% waterproof, the adhesive used to stick them needs a dry surface. For actively damp walls, we recommend applying a waterproofing chemical or creating a thin aluminum/plywood grid first.

faqs.question: Do you provide installation accessories like matching edge trims?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors provides a complete ecosystem. We stock matching WPC L-profiles, U-trims, and fastener clips in the same Cobra shades to ensure your project has a flawless, professional finish.

faqs.question: How do you clean the dust that settles in the flutes/grooves?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is very simple. You can use a standard feather duster, a dry microfiber cloth, or a vacuum cleaner with a soft brush nozzle to quickly remove any dust that settles in the grooves.

faqs.question: Are these panels suitable for commercial high-traffic areas?
faqs.answer: Yes. For commercial spaces like hotel lobbies or office corridors, we recommend our thicker 24mm or 28mm Cobra panels. They offer excellent impact resistance against luggage, carts, or heavy foot traffic.

faqs.question: Do you supply the Cobra series in bulk to interior contractors in Noida and Delhi?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is the preferred wholesale supplier for interior designers and contractors across Delhi NCR. We offer dedicated B2B pricing and rapid site-delivery for bulk project orders.

title: Premium Upfit Panels for Exteriors & Soffits
shortDescription: A brilliant, ultra-low-cost ceiling and exterior cladding system. Unbreakable, fire-resistant, and waterproof Upfit panels in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Transform your building's exterior and ceilings with G-F Upfit Panels. Engineered specifically for high-performance exterior applications, these panels are the ultimate solution for soffits, eaves, and modern building facades across Gurugram and Delhi NCR.

Unlike traditional PVC or heavy wood, Upfit Panels offer a brilliant ceiling system at an ultra-low cost. They are ultra-lightweight, highly flexible, and completely unbreakable under normal architectural stress. Designed to withstand the harsh Indian weather, they are 100% waterproof and fire-resistant, providing both aesthetic beauty and structural safety.

Available in two versatile sizes—the Regular Size 230mm for narrow flutes and the Extra-Long 305mm for wide ceiling coverage—Goals Floors ensures you have the perfect fit for any residential or commercial project. Upgrade to a clean, modern finish with minimal maintenance.

features.title: Unbreakable & Flexible
features.description: Manufactured with high-tensile materials that do not crack or break easily, allowing for slight bending on architectural curves.

features.title: 100% Weather & Waterproof
features.description: Built to last in tough exterior conditions. Completely impervious to rain and moisture, preventing any rotting or fungal growth.

features.title: Ultra-Lightweight Design
features.description: Significantly reduces the dead load on your ceiling and soffit framing, making installation faster, safer, and highly cost-effective.

features.title: Fire Resistant
features.description: Ensures safety alongside style. The panels are treated to resist fire spread, making them ideal for commercial and residential exteriors.

features.title: Zero Maintenance
features.description: Save time and effort. The premium surface requires minimal upkeep and can be cleaned effortlessly to maintain its modern look.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Architecture
features.description: Made from sustainable, recyclable materials, offering premium architectural quality without harming the environment.

logistics.Packaging: Standard Box Packaging with Edge Protection
logistics.Availability: High Volume Ready Stock in Gurugram

installation: Hassle-free setup. Panels feature an interlocking edge and are secured onto an aluminium or MS sub-frame. Use our matching J-Trims, H-Trims, and L-Profiles to ensure perfectly clean edges, corners, and joints.
maintenance: Requires almost no maintenance. For exterior dust build-up, simply wipe down with a damp cloth or wash with mild soapy water. The surface retains its color and texture over time.

faqs.question: What exactly are Upfit Panels used for?
faqs.answer: Upfit Panels are high-performance decorative panels primarily used for exterior ceilings, soffits, eaves, and facade enhancements. They provide a clean, modern finish while protecting the structure.

faqs.question: Are these panels suitable for outdoor weather in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are 100% weather-resistant and waterproof. They are specifically designed to withstand extreme heat, rain, and humidity without warping or fading.

faqs.question: Are Upfit Panels heavy?
faqs.answer: Not at all. They are ultra-lightweight (approx 2.0 kg to 2.7 kg per panel), making them extremely easy to handle and reducing the structural load on ceiling frameworks.

faqs.question: Do you provide edge profiles and trims for installation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors provides a complete matching accessory kit including Upfit L-Profiles, J-Trims, and H-Trims to ensure a seamless and professional installation.

faqs.question: Is the material fire safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Upfit Panels are fire-resistant, adding a critical layer of safety to your residential or commercial building exteriors.

title: Cobra PU Stone Panels
shortDescription: Ultra-lightweight Cobra PU artificial stone panels for highly realistic, hassle-free stone wall cladding in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Goals Floors introduces the revolutionary Cobra PU (Polyurethane) Stone series to Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. Engineered using high-density polyurethane and advanced 3D molding technology, these panels deliver the exact rugged, organic texture of natural stone but at a fraction of the weight. 

Traditional stone cladding is extremely heavy, requires massive structural support, and involves messy cement work. Our Cobra PU Stone panels bypass all these issues. Weighing almost 90% less than real stone, they can be directly glued to any dry wall, plywood, or existing surface in hours, not days. This makes them the ultimate choice for rapid luxury renovations in high-rise apartments, hotel lobbies in Aerocity, and modern corporate offices in Cyber City.

As a premier wholesale supplier in the NCR region, Goals Floors guarantees panels that are not only visually stunning but also technically superior—featuring Class B1 fire retardancy, 100% water resistance, and excellent acoustic dampening properties.

features.title: Ultra-Lightweight Material
features.description: Weighs nearly 90% less than natural stone. This drastically reduces the dead load on building structures and makes transportation and handling effortless.

features.title: Hyper-Realistic 3D Texture
features.description: Molded from real stone slabs, capturing every cleft, vein, and organic imperfection for an indistinguishable natural look.

features.title: Rapid, Dry Installation
features.description: No messy cement, mortar, or heavy machinery required. Can be easily cut with standard woodworking tools and installed using structural adhesives.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Anti-Fungal
features.description: High-density polyurethane absorbs zero moisture, preventing mold, mildew, and swelling even in damp basements or bathrooms.

features.title: Class B1 Fire Retardant
features.description: Manufactured to meet strict commercial fire safety standards, ensuring the material self-extinguishes and doesn't spread flames.

features.title: Thermal & Acoustic Insulation
features.description: The dense PU foam core naturally acts as an insulator, breaking sound waves to reduce echo while maintaining indoor temperatures.

installation: The fastest stone installation system available. Panels are simply aligned and pasted onto any flat, dust-free surface (plaster, plywood, or drywall) using heavy-duty structural PU adhesives (like 3M or equivalent). For added security on high walls, concealed screws can be driven through the overlapping joints.
maintenance: Completely zero maintenance. The non-porous surface does not absorb dust or stains. Simply wipe with a damp microfiber cloth or use a vacuum cleaner with a brush attachment to clean the deep 3D crevices.

faqs.question: What exactly is PU Stone and how is it different from natural stone?
faqs.answer: PU (Polyurethane) Stone is an advanced artificial architectural panel. While natural stone is extremely heavy, expensive, and requires messy mortar installation, PU Stone is made from high-density foam molded to look exactly like real stone. It is incredibly lightweight, waterproof, and installs rapidly using just adhesive.

faqs.question: Do you supply PU Stone panels wholesale to interior contractors in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a leading B2B supplier of PU Stone in Delhi NCR. We offer tiered wholesale pricing, bulk project discounts, and dedicated warehouse dispatch for architects, builders, and interior contractors.

faqs.question: Are Cobra PU Stone panels safe for commercial hotels and office buildings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our Cobra series PU Stone panels are manufactured with Class B1 fire-retardant properties. They are self-extinguishing and comply with strict commercial safety standards for high-rise buildings and hospitality projects.

faqs.question: Can I install these PU stone panels in a damp basement or bathroom?
faqs.answer: Yes. Polyurethane is a 100% non-porous and waterproof material. It absorbs zero moisture, making it highly resistant to mold, fungus, and dampness, which is perfect for basements and bathroom dry zones.

faqs.question: How much weight does PU stone add to a wall compared to real stone?
faqs.answer: This is its biggest advantage. PU stone weighs approximately 1.5 to 2.5 kg per panel, which is nearly 90% lighter than natural stone cladding. It adds virtually no dead load, meaning you do not need heavy structural framing or reinforced walls.

faqs.question: How are the PU stone panels installed?
faqs.answer: Installation is a completely dry, mess-free process. The panels can be easily cut with standard wood-cutting saws. They are then pasted directly onto a levelled wall or plywood using structural PU glue (like 3M or Dow). Concealed screws can be used in the overlapping joints for extra grip.

faqs.question: Are these artificial stone panels suitable for outdoor exterior facades?
faqs.answer: While highly durable and waterproof, standard PU Stone is primarily designed for interior luxury spaces or semi-covered exterior areas (like deep balconies or porches) to prevent long-term UV fading. For direct, harsh sunlight, specialized UV coatings are required.

faqs.question: Is the material eco-friendly and safe for indoor air quality?
faqs.answer: Yes. High-quality polyurethane used in our Cobra series is free from harmful CFCs, formaldehydes, and heavy metals. It produces zero VOC emissions, ensuring excellent and safe indoor air quality for residential bedrooms and living rooms.

faqs.question: Will the panel look 'fake' or plasticky up close?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Our molds are cast directly from high-end natural stone slabs. This captures every micro-texture, cleft, and organic imperfection. Finished with premium multi-layered paints, it looks and feels remarkably like real stone even from inches away.

faqs.question: Can I see physical samples of the PU Stone before placing a bulk order?
faqs.answer: Yes, we encourage it! Architects and clients are welcome to visit our experience center and warehouse in Gurugram to physically check the textures, weight, and premium quality of our PU Stone panels before finalizing their tender or design.

title: Premium Artificial Grass & Synthetic Turf
shortDescription: Heavy-duty, UV-treated synthetic grass rolls for luxury balconies, terraces, and commercial landscaping across Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Transform your outdoor spaces into evergreen sanctuaries with Goals Floors' Premium Artificial Grass collection. Designed specifically for the extreme weather conditions of North India, our synthetic turf withstands the scorching Gurugram summer heat without fading and handles heavy Delhi monsoons with its advanced high-flow drainage backing.

Whether you are upgrading a high-rise apartment balcony in Noida, designing a lush terrace garden, or executing a massive commercial landscaping project for a corporate park in Cyber City, our grass provides a hyper-realistic, 4-tone natural appearance. Say goodbye to the endless costs of watering, mowing, and gardeners.

As a leading wholesale distributor in Haryana and NCR, we provide high-density turf (from 25mm to luxurious 50mm pile heights) that is 100% pet-friendly, child-safe, and built for heavy foot traffic. Experience the perfect blend of aesthetics and zero-maintenance durability.

features.title: Advanced UV Stabilization
features.description: Engineered with a protective UV coating that prevents the grass yarn from fading or becoming brittle under harsh, direct sunlight.

features.title: Hyper-Realistic 4-Tone Yarn
features.description: Combines emerald green, olive green, and a brown thatch layer to mimic the exact look and feel of a natural, healthy lawn.

features.title: High-Flow Drainage System
features.description: The double-layered backing features precision-punched drainage holes, ensuring rainwater washes away instantly without pooling.

features.title: 100% Pet & Child Safe
features.description: Made from non-toxic, lead-free polyethylene. It is completely safe for kids to play on and extremely easy to clean after pets.

features.title: Zero Maintenance Required
features.description: Save thousands of rupees annually on water bills, fertilizers, and gardeners. Just install it once and enjoy a green lawn all year round.

features.title: Heavy-Duty Commercial Durability
features.description: With stitch densities going up to 24,900/M2, our turf is built to withstand high foot traffic in cafes, schools, and public events.

logistics.Availability: Bulk Ready Stock in Gurugram Warehouse

installation: Can be installed on both hard surfaces and soil. For balconies (tiles/concrete), the turf is simply rolled out and secured using heavy-duty double-sided turf tape or specialized synthetic grass adhesive. For soil landscaping, it requires a compacted base of crushed stone dust and is secured using galvanized U-pins along the edges.
maintenance: Extremely low maintenance. For indoor/balcony use, simply use a vacuum cleaner or a stiff-bristled broom to remove dry leaves and dust. For outdoor areas, you can occasionally hose it down with water. Solid pet waste should be picked up, and the area can be rinsed with a mild soapy solution to prevent odors.

faqs.question: Do you provide wholesale artificial grass rolls in Gurugram and Delhi?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier of synthetic turf in the NCR region. We supply full 539 sq. ft. rolls at direct wholesale prices to landscapers, builders, and interior designers.

faqs.question: Will the artificial grass fade in the extreme Delhi NCR summer heat?
faqs.answer: No. Our premium range is manufactured with high-grade UV stabilizers. This ensures the grass retains its vibrant green color and structural integrity even when exposed to direct, harsh sunlight for years.

faqs.question: What happens during heavy monsoons? Will water pool on my balcony?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Our grass features a specialized double-layered backing with punched drainage holes. Water passes right through it and flows towards your balcony or garden's natural drainage outlet, preventing any waterlogging.

faqs.question: Which pile height should I choose: 25mm, 35mm, 40mm, or 50mm?
faqs.answer: 25mm is great for budget balconies and heavy commercial use. 35mm and 40mm are the most popular for realistic residential lawns and terraces. 50mm is the ultimate luxury turf, offering a highly dense, cushion-like feel for premium spaces.

faqs.question: Is your synthetic turf safe for dogs and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. It is 100% non-toxic and cannot be dug up by dogs. Liquid waste drains through the backing, and solid waste can be easily picked up. You can wash the area with water and mild soap to keep it fresh.

faqs.question: Can I install artificial grass on normal soil or mud?
faqs.answer: Yes, but not directly. The mud needs to be cleared, leveled, and covered with a compacted layer of stone dust or gravel to ensure proper drainage and an even surface before laying the grass and pinning it down.

faqs.question: Can I place heavy patio furniture on the grass?
faqs.answer: Yes, our high-density yarn (up to 24,900 stitches/m2) is designed to handle heavy weights. The grass blades might flatten slightly under the legs of heavy furniture, but brushing them with a stiff broom will help them stand back upright.

faqs.question: Does artificial grass make the balcony hotter?
faqs.answer: Synthetic turf does absorb heat under direct afternoon sun. However, it cools down very quickly once shaded. You can also lightly spray it with water before using the space on extremely hot summer days.

faqs.question: How long does a roll of premium artificial grass last?
faqs.answer: With standard residential use and proper installation, our premium synthetic grass can easily last 8 to 12 years while maintaining its lush appearance, backed by our 5-year UV warranty.

faqs.question: Can I buy cut sizes or do I have to buy a full roll?
faqs.answer: While we specialize in bulk B2B roll supplies (539 sq. ft.), we do offer custom cut sizes (by running feet) for residential balcony projects. Please contact our sales team with your exact dimensions for a quote.

title: Cobra WPC Decking & Outdoor Flooring
shortDescription: Heavy-duty, weather-resistant Cobra WPC decking planks for luxury farmhouses, balconies, and swimming pool areas in Delhi NCR.
longDescription: Introducing Goals Floors' Premium Cobra WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) Decking series, designed to redefine outdoor living spaces across Gurugram, Delhi, and Noida. Engineered using an advanced co-extrusion process, these solid core decking planks offer the luxurious look and feel of natural hardwood but are completely immune to the devastating effects of moisture, termite attacks, and North India's extreme temperature fluctuations.

features.title: 100% Weather & Waterproof
features.description: Zero water absorption ensures the decking will not swell, rot, split, or become slippery even during heavy monsoon seasons or around swimming pools.

features.title: Termite & Borer Proof (Lifetime)
features.description: The polymer composite core is completely impervious to pests, offering a lifetime of structural safety and peace of mind against wood-boring insects.

features.title: UV-Resistant Shield Tech
features.description: Engineered with a co-extruded UV-stabilized shield that prevents fading and color degradation under the direct, harsh summer sun of Delhi NCR.

features.title: Deep Natural Wood Texture
features.description: Features a realistic, anti-scratch wood grain pattern that mimics natural timber aesthetics without the maintenance of yearly polishing or varnishing.

features.title: Safe & Non-Slip Surface
features.description: The textured surface provides an excellent grip even when wet, making it highly safe for children and elderly people around pools or on wet balconies.

features.title: Eco-Friendly & Recyclable
features.description: Manufactured using 100% recyclable, Formaldehyde-free materials, offering a sustainable building solution for green architectural projects.

installation: Requires a sturdy sub-frame of Aluminium or MS (Mild Steel) pipes. The planks are interlocked using concealed stainless-steel clips and exterior-grade fasteners, ensuring hidden joints.
maintenance: Completely zero maintenance. Clean easily using a garden hose or a pressure washer. Use a soft brush with mild soap for stubborn bird droppings or stains.

faqs.question: Will the WPC decking become very hot under direct Gurugram summer sunlight?
faqs.answer: Yes, WPC, like all outdoor flooring materials (including natural wood and tiles), will absorb heat when exposed to direct afternoon sun. We recommend hosing it down with water for a quick cooldown before using the space during extreme heat hours.

faqs.question: Can I install WPC decking directly on soil or mud?
faqs.answer: No. WPC decking requires a rigid sub-frame made of Aluminium, MS pipes, or specialized WPC joists. This frame ensures proper ventilation, drainage, and structural support. It should be installed on a levelled concrete base, tiled surface, or a compacted gravel base.

faqs.question: Do you supply WPC decking wholesale for large farmhouse projects in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a leading B2B supplier of WPC decking. We cater to wholesale orders for farmhouses, residential societies, and commercial projects with tiered pricing, bulk discounts, and dedicated logistics for architects and developers.

faqs.question: What is the warranty period for your WPC decking planks?
faqs.answer: We offer a genuine 5-year replacement warranty against manufacturing defects, warping, and severe color fading due to UV exposure, along with a 15-year lifetime assurance on its structural integrity.

faqs.question: Will the WPC decking become slippery when wet, especially around a swimming pool?
faqs.answer: No. Our WPC decking features an embedded anti-slip wood grain texture on one side and fine ridges on the other. It offers superior traction even when wet, making it safe for children and pets around pool decks and wet balconies.

faqs.question: How do you calculate the exact requirement and wastage for my balcony?
faqs.answer: Measure the width and height of the area. One plank covers approximately 4 sq. ft. Factor in an additional 8% to 12% for cutting wastage and edge finishing. Our sales team provides exact plank calculations and a tailored quote during consultation.

faqs.question: Can the WPC decking handle heavy wind loads on high-rise balconies?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. WPC decking is installed using concealed stainless steel clips that fasten securely to the sub-frame. This interlocking system creates a highly rigid structure designed to safely withstand typical high wind loads encountered on high-rise balconies in Noida and Gurugram.

faqs.question: Is WPC decking termite-proof and resistant to fungus?
faqs.answer: Yes. WPC is 100% termite and borer proof. Unlike real wood, the polymer composite core is completely impervious to pests and fungus, ensuring a lifetime of safety and zero pest control maintenance.

faqs.question: How do you clean WPC decking after bird droppings or stains?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is effortless. Use a standard water hose to rinse off dirt. For stubborn stains or bird droppings, use a soft-bristled brush and mild soapy water (dishwasher soap) to gently scrub the area, then rinse thoroughly. Avoid using bleach or harsh industrial chemicals.

faqs.question: Do you maintain ready stock for immediate delivery to project sites in NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes. We maintain massive ready stock in our central warehouse in Gurugram. For standard shades and sizes, we can arrange express delivery to project sites in Gurugram, Noida, and Delhi within 24 to 48 hours of order confirmation.

title: Cobra Gold SPC Flooring
shortDescription: 100% waterproof, 6mm ultra-durable Cobra Gold SPC flooring with real wood grain texture for luxury homes and offices in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Transform your living and working spaces with Goals Floors' premium Cobra Gold SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) Flooring. Engineered specifically for the demanding climate and modern lifestyle of Gurugram and Delhi NCR, this flooring combines the stunning, authentic aesthetics of natural hardwood with absolute water resistance and ultimate structural durability.

Unlike traditional laminate or real wood that swells and warps with moisture, our Cobra Gold SPC features a rigid stone-polymer core. It boasts a heavy-duty 0.5mm wear layer, making it completely scratch-resistant and perfect for high-traffic areas like retail stores in Cyber City, corporate offices, and luxury residential apartments. With its advanced Uniclick interlocking system, installation is fast, mess-free, and seamless.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: The stone-polymer core absorbs zero moisture. It will never swell, warp, or attract termites, making it perfect for kitchens and basements.

features.title: 0.5mm Commercial Wear Layer
features.description: Engineered for heavy foot traffic. The thick transparent wear layer protects against scratches, dents, and stains from kids and pets.

features.title: EIR - Real Wood Grain Texture
features.description: Features Embossed-In-Register (EIR) technology, ensuring the physical texture exactly matches the visual wood grain for a hyper-realistic feel.

features.title: Uniclick Installation System
features.description: Rapid, glue-less installation. The precision-milled Uniclick joints seamlessly lock together, ensuring a flawless, gap-free finish.

features.title: V-Groove Painted Edges
features.description: Each plank features a subtle, painted V-groove edge, enhancing the authentic hardwood plank aesthetic once installed.

features.title: Acoustic Comfort & Fire Retardant
features.description: Reduces hollow footfall sounds compared to standard tiles and is manufactured with strict Class B1 fire retardant properties.

logistics.Availability: Ready B2B Stock in Gurugram Hub

installation: Extremely fast, dry installation. The subfloor must be flat, clean, and dry. An acoustic underlay is laid down first, and then the SPC planks are simply clicked together using the Uniclick system. No messy glues or heavy machinery required. Skirting and T-profiles are used for a neat edge finish.
maintenance: Virtually maintenance-free. Sweep or vacuum regularly. For deep cleaning, use a damp mop with a pH-neutral floor cleaner. Never use steam cleaners, abrasive scrubbers, or flooding the floor with water.

faqs.question: Why is SPC Flooring better than traditional Laminate Flooring?
faqs.answer: SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) has a stone core, making it 100% waterproof and termite-proof. Traditional laminate has a wood-dust (HDF) core which swells if exposed to water. SPC is also more stable in extreme temperatures, making it ideal for Delhi NCR.

faqs.question: Can Cobra Gold SPC flooring be installed in kitchens and bathrooms?
faqs.answer: It is highly recommended for kitchens due to its 100% waterproof nature and scratch resistance. However, for wet areas like bathroom shower floors, ceramic tiles are still the standard.

faqs.question: Is SPC flooring safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The 0.5mm commercial wear layer makes it highly resistant to pet scratches. It is also non-toxic, Formaldehyde-free, and easy to sanitize, making it perfect for kids and pets.

faqs.question: Do you supply wholesale SPC flooring to builders in Gurugram?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a premier wholesale distributor. We provide tiered B2B pricing, immediate warehouse dispatch, and dedicated support for architects and interior contractors across the NCR region.

faqs.question: Can SPC be installed over my existing marble or tile floor?
faqs.answer: Yes! As long as your existing tile or marble floor is flat, even, and solid, SPC flooring can be installed directly over it without any demolition, saving you immense time and labor costs.

faqs.question: What does the 0.5mm Wear Layer mean?
faqs.answer: The wear layer is the clear protective coating on top of the design. Standard residential SPC uses 0.3mm. Our 0.5mm wear layer is 'Commercial Grade', meaning it can withstand heavy traffic in offices, cafes, and busy homes without wearing out.

faqs.question: Do I need to buy extra accessories with the flooring?
faqs.answer: To get a professional finish, you will need matching accessories. 'Skirting' covers the wall expansion gap, 'T-Profiles' are used for doorways, and 'Reducers' seamlessly connect the SPC to lower floors (like tiles).

faqs.question: How long does the installation take?
faqs.answer: Because of the Uniclick system, it is extremely fast. A standard 3-bedroom apartment can usually be fully floored in just 1 to 2 days without any dust, smell, or wet cement.

faqs.question: Will SPC flooring make a hollow clicking sound when walking?
faqs.answer: While rigid floors naturally have some acoustics, our SPC flooring is installed over a premium IXPE/EVA underlayment which significantly dampens footfall noise, providing a quiet, comfortable walk.

faqs.question: How do I maintain the 'Real Wood Grain' EIR texture?
faqs.answer: Maintenance is effortless. The EIR texture doesn't trap dirt easily. Regular sweeping and occasional mopping with a damp microfiber cloth is all that's required to keep it looking brand new.
